capabilities.name: Realized FX gain/loss on payment
capabilities.verify: book_invoice_paid v2: payment-date rate vs invoices.exchange_rate → Cr 3960 gain / Dt 7960 loss, mirrors revalue_open_balances delta model (migration 20260612150000)
capabilities.notes: Stage-3 verified 2026-06-12: smoke 6/6 (gain 5000 + loss -6000 JEs balanced, base-currency no-op, idempotent, rate-lookup failure never blocks payment). Existing skill/UI surfaces (mark_paid, auto_mark_invoice_paid, status trigger) gain it with no contract change — dual-surface unchanged.

capabilities.name: Local-currency subsidiary ledgers
capabilities.verify: subsidiaries table + journal_entries.subsidiary_id + manage_subsidiary (create/list/update/tag_entry) + subsidiary_ledger_report (per-account local-currency totals) (20260708060000). LIVE VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-07 via gateway: NOK entry tagged to NO01 reported 1930 +500000 / 3000 −500000 in NOK.

capabilities.name: Consolidation currency translation
capabilities.verify: consolidation_report: closing-rate (fx_rate_at, inverse-pair fallback) translation of per-account nets for HQ + active subsidiaries into a presentation currency, missing rates flagged (20260708060000). LIVE VERIFIED 2026-07-07: NO01 translated at 0.95 (500000 NOK → 475000 SEK per account).

capabilities.name: Hedging/forward contracts
capabilities.verify: fx_forward_contracts + manage_fx_forward (create/list/get/settle/cancel/mark_to_market); settle posts realized gain/loss (Dt 1930/Cr 3960 or Dt 7960/Cr 1930) (20260708060000). LIVE VERIFIED 2026-07-07: buy 1000 USD @10.00 vs spot 10.80 → MTM +80000, settle posted a balanced 80000 JE.

capabilities.name: Bulk historical rate import
capabilities.verify: import_exchange_rates(p_rates jsonb) bulk upsert on (base,quote,rate_date) with per-row validation (20260708060000). LIVE VERIFIED 2026-07-07: 3 imported, 1 invalid row skipped and reported.
